summary: Monthly/yearly subscriber live game overlap market - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN the user is a monthly/yearly subscriber
AND there is a game scheduled/in-progress between teams in an overlapping viewing market 
AND the user is in the viewing market of the game
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals true in MASTepg

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the game tile
steps.result:
THEN gameMedia is called
AND the Feed Select modal is displayed
AND a title displays with text "_Stream On: <Partner Service>_"
AND a message displays with text "_This broadcast is available to watch on <insert first partner> and <insert second partner>. Please download from your device app store to watch now. Archives will be available 90 minutes after the end of the game. Live Audio is available on_ +_MLB.TV_+_._"
